  "findings": [
    "Ice barrier missing in a cold climate zone",
    "Non-compliance with building code requirements for ice dam protection"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the lower courses of roofing shingles/covering to expose the roof deck at the eaves",
    "Install a self-adhering polymer-modified bitumen sheet ice barrier extending from the eave edge to at least 24 inches inside the exterior wall line",
    "Reinstall roofing covering in accordance with manufacturer specifications"
  ],
  "rationale": "The roof covering was installed without the required ice barrier membrane in a cold climate region. This violates IRC Section R905 requirements for ice dam protection and manufacturer installation specifications, creating a high risk of water intrusion from ice damming.",
  "references": [
    "IRC Section R905.1.2",
    "IRC Section R905.2.7.1",
    "Manufacturer Installation Specifications"
  ]
}
